name: mediqueue-opd-system
description: MediQueue - Complete Hospital OPD Management System

scripts.setup: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.start: concurrently --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND" --prefix-colors "blue,green" "cd backend && node server.js" "cd frontend && npm start"
scripts.dev: concurrently --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND" --prefix-colors "blue,green" "cd backend && npm run dev" "cd frontend && npm start"
